case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. DEVIN FORE

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FORE, DEVIN $1,433.56 PRINCIPAL, $240.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,674.06, SEE SCANNED DOC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF DEC-10-2019 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-11-2019 CONTINUED TO OCT-08-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
